step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with this recommendation because both BCG and first-dose OPV have established guidelines supporting their use in unvaccinated children under 5 years old. Additionally, administering these two vaccines early helps establish immunity during critical developmental stages while minimizing future risk exposures.
